pi_items.source: Task requirements analysis: 12 process steps (minimum) + 3 decision diamonds + 2+ data objects + start/end events = ~18 minimum shapes for comprehensive P2P swimlane diagram
Verifier threshold from verifier.py line 97; represents minimum flow connections expected in swimlane diagram
Task description explicitly requires: 'Add a second page titled KPI Dashboard that lists at least 5 Key Performance Indicators for the P2P process'

Task description: 'Create a complete swim lane process diagram in draw.io with exactly 5 horizontal lanes corresponding to the 5 departments: (1) Requester, (2) Procurement, (3) Accounts Payable, (4) Supplier, (5) Finance/Treasury'
Task description: 'Save as ~/Desktop/p2p_process.drawio'; user 'ga' has home directory /home/ga, so ~ expands to /home/ga/Desktop/
Task description: 'export as ~/Desktop/p2p_process.pdf (use File > Export As > PDF)'; user 'ga' has home directory /home/ga, so ~ expands to /home/ga/Desktop/

privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating a P2P swimlane flowchart in draw.io with exactly 5 departments (Requester, Procurement, Accounts Payable, Supplier, Finance/Treasury) with minimum 18 shapes, 12 edges, and 2 pages (process diagram plus KPI Dashboard). The process specification is generated from APQC Process Classification Framework v7.3 (real standard, v7.3.1 released September 2023) and SAP Source-to-Pay best practices. Files output to /home/ga/Desktop/p2p_process.drawio and /home/ga/Desktop/p2p_process.pdf. Draw.io version 26.0.9 (released January 27, 2025) is used. Task includes 14 defined process steps, 5 decision gateways, and requires at least 4 data object documents (Purchase Requisition, Purchase Order, Goods Receipt, Invoice). All metadata claims have been verified against task description.
